title: Control Flow Statements (if, for, while, try, with) should not be nested too deeply
description: Deep nesting of control flow statements can make the code harder to read, understand, and maintain.
message: Nested control flow statements are too deep.
recommendation: Refactor nested control flow statements to improve readability.
why_is_this_an_issue: Deep nesting of control flow statements increases the complexity of the code, making it harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the nested control flow statements to flatten the structure.
